title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 23: How to Install & Use Flux Tools, Fill, Redux, Depth, Canny
description:
In this episode, I guide you through installing and using Flux Tools in ComfyUI. Learn how to set up powerful tools like Flux Fill for seamless inpainting, Flux Depth for generating depth map-based creations, Flux Canny for sketch-based guidance, and Flux Redux for creating unique image variations.

What You'll Learn:
- Installing Flux Tools: Step-by-step instructions to download and set up models
- Flux Fill: Easily inpaint images by selecting and editing specific areas.
- Flux Depth: Generate art based on depth maps, similar to ControlNet workflows.
- Flux Canny: Use Canny edge maps to guide detailed and creative generations.
- Flux Redux: Explore variations of images without needing detailed prompts.
- Advanced Features: Combine multiple images, tweak model intensity, and experiment with outpainting techniques.

Why Watch This Episode?
I include detailed workflows, troubleshooting tips, and practical examples to help you get the most out of these tools. All workflows featured in thi

Flux Cane uses a Cane image to guide the generation,  and Flux Redust can create variations  similar to the image you provide.
